note_text: Wound note - Leftheel. Meas 3.5x3.9x0.8cm. Mod serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 58% gran, 42% slough. Periwound intact. Alginate dsg applied. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Espinoza notified.

Wound note - Leftheel. Meas 3.5x3.9x0.8cm. Mod serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 39% gran, 61% slough. Periwound macerated. Collagen dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Kaczmarek notified.
